case_title: LAZARO CABRERA VS. ORIGAMI, INC. A CALIFORNIA COTPORATION DBA SPIRE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABRERA, LAZARO AS TO DEFENDANT ORIGAMI, INC. A CALIFORNIA COTPORATION DBA SPIRE RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CABRERA, LAZARO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORIGAMI, INC. A CALIFORNIA COTPORATION DBA SPIRE RESTAURANT $6,131.55 PRINCIPAL, $57.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,414.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
